title: Quantum Error Correction and Fault Tolerance

analysis.object: T686: Quantum Error Correction and Fault Tolerance depth analysis

logical_qubit_emlinf.description: Logical qubit: EML-inf; protected quantum information
logical_qubit_emlinf.reason: Logical qubit is EML-inf: encoded quantum information is EML-inf; physically stored in many physical qubits

syndrome_measurement.description: Error syndrome: EML-0 (discrete error type) or EML-2 (parity check measurement)
syndrome_measurement.reason: Error syndrome is EML-0: discrete Pauli error classification; EML-2 parity measurement identifies it

threshold_theorem.description: Fault tolerance threshold: EML-2 measurement; below threshold -> scalable QC
threshold_theorem.reason: Threshold theorem is EML-2: error rate below ~1% enables EML-inf logical qubit protection

surface_code.description: Surface code: EML-0 topological invariants protect EML-inf logical qubit via EML-2 syndromes
surface_code.reason: Surface code = topological QEC: EML-0 topology + EML-2 syndromes -> EML-inf logical protection
